method: Per day k in {0,1,2}, T= (7-k)/365. Aligned ticks with VELVETFRUIT_EXTRACT + VEV_4000 + VEV_4500. (1) Lead/lag: corr(log extract ret t->t+lag, log voucher ret same window). Lag 0 is identically 0.0 (same-timestamp mids). Lag1~0.59, lag5~0.87 for both strikes. (2) IV skew IV(4000)-IV(4500) from BS-1 of mids vs corr with mean L1 spread: ~-0.79 all days. (3) vega at IV from mid: 4000/4500 mean ~10-13. Implication: use smoothed extract for IV/greeks; gate depth by EMA of IV skew (high skew associates with tighter books on tape).
